layout.surface_style: Grid Borders (Technical Look): Flat backgrounds with 1px border-zinc-800, no shadows, slightly rounded (rounded-md)

components.cards: Flat background (bg-zinc-900), 1px solid border (border-zinc-800), rounded-md. Avoid heavy shadows. Keep it tight and dense.
components.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-sm), high contrast. Primary CTA (e.g., set regime): bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white. Danger (Kill Switch): bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-500 text-white border-2 border-red-500/50.
components.badges: font-mono text-[10px] md:text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-sm border. NORMAL: green, EVENT: amber, TREND: blue, BLOCKED: red.
components.charts: Recharts. Axes in JetBrains Mono text-xs text-zinc-500. Grid lines 1px dashed zinc-800. Tooltips: backdrop-blur-md bg-zinc-950/90 border border-zinc-800.
components.tables: Dense layout. font-mono for numbers. text-right for numeric values. border-b border-zinc-800 for rows.

motion.status_pulse: Live indicator uses animate-ping on a 6px green/red dot

background_texture.description: Subtle oil rig background for the empty state or login overlay. Apply an 85% opacity black overlay (bg-black/85) to ensure high text contrast.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure you are building a dashboard optimized for Dark Mode (Theme 2: The Performance Pro).
Use 'Outfit' for headings, 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text, and 'JetBrains Mono' for ALL financial data, numbers, tables, and tickers.
Top Control Bar: Include a prominent 'Kill Switch' button (red, pulse effect), a Paper/Live mode toggle, and the Current Regime badge.
Dashboard Layout (Bento Grid Mode B): Main area uses a 12-col grid. The Main Chart (WTI Prices) should span 8 columns, while side panels (Signal Confidence, Econ Calendar) span 4 columns.
Signal Confidence: Visualize using a progress bar or circular gauge (use custom SVG or Shadcn Progress) indicating ML confidence (e.g., 87% LONG).
Risk Metrics: Display daily loss, consecutive losses, and drawdown in a compact metrics grid (col-span-1 each).
Backtesting Tab: Provide a secondary view showing an Equity Curve chart (Recharts AreaChart) and a detailed trade history table.
Economic Calendar: A vertical list feed showing upcoming events (OPEC, EIA) with impact indicators (High/Med/Low).
Use standard HTML + Tailwind for structural layouts, and customize Shadcn components (Tabs, Table, Button, Badge) heavily with dark mode colors.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all buttons, tabs, and interactive elements for testing.
